title: Ever used monday CRM to manage real estate deals? Here’s how it can handle acquisitions, dispositions, and everything in between
excerpt:

posts.author: Sammy (Samantha)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re back with another Tuesdays with monday session — and this one’s packed with real-world, advanced use of monday CRM beyond just tracking leads.

Join us for a 30-minute live walkthrough of how real estate teams use monday.com to manage:
Property-level activities
Compliance workflows
Multi-step processes with multiple stakeholders
Real-time visibility across moving parts

If you’re into building smart, scalable workflows inside monday.com — you’ll want to see this one.

Tuesday, April 22 | 12:00–12:30 PM EST
Register here

Live demo + bonus tip + live Q&A
Can’t make it live? Register anyway and we’ll send the recording.

posts.author: graceg (Grace Griffin @Purple Plum Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking forward to another interesting Tuesdays with monday!

posts.author: allison_purple (Allison Prell)
posts.cookedHtml: Can’t wait! Love seeing this happen in our community.
